code:
def create_charts(df):
    import pandas as pd
    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
    
    # Create the first figure: Scatter plot of time_in_hospital vs readmission_rate
    fig1 = go.Figure()
    fig1.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df['time_in_hospital'], y=df['readmission_rate'],
                              mode='markers',
                              marker=dict(color='#44BFFC'),
                              name='Readmission Rate'))
    fig1.update_layout(title='Scatter Plot of Length of Stay vs Readmission Rate',
                       xaxis_title='Length of Stay (days)',
                       yaxis_title='Readmission Rate',
                       template='plotly_white')
    
    # Create the second figure: Bar chart of time_in_hospital vs total_patients
    fig2 = go.Figure()
    fig2.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df['time_in_hospital'], y=df['total_patients'],
                          marker=dict(color='#81FBA5'),
                          name='Total Patients'))
    fig2.update_layout(title='Bar Chart of Length of Stay vs Total Patients',
                       xaxis_title='Length of Stay (days)',
                       yaxis_title='Total Patients',
                       template='plotly_white')
    
    return fig1, fig2

metadata.question: What is the relationship between length of stay and readmission?

code_history.code:
def create_charts(df):
    import pandas as pd
    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
    
    # Create the first figure: Scatter plot of time_in_hospital vs readmission_rate
    fig1 = go.Figure()
    fig1.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df['time_in_hospital'], y=df['readmission_rate'],
                              mode='markers',
                              marker=dict(color='#44BFFC'),
                              name='Readmission Rate'))
    fig1.update_layout(title='Scatter Plot of Length of Stay vs Readmission Rate',
                       xaxis_title='Length of Stay (days)',
                       yaxis_title='Readmission Rate',
                       template='plotly_white')
    
    # Create the second figure: Bar chart of time_in_hospital vs total_patients
    fig2 = go.Figure()
    fig2.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df['time_in_hospital'], y=df['total_patients'],
                          marker=dict(color='#81FBA5'),
                          name='Total Patients'))
    fig2.update_layout(title='Bar Chart of Length of Stay vs Total Patients',
                       xaxis_title='Length of Stay (days)',
                       yaxis_title='Total Patients',
                       template='plotly_white')
    
    return fig1, fig2
